{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221943040E07616CF977E3D9D2FD"}"},"total":555},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7118952854186541856","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"五星好评，特别是改变琪琪的生活，而且是两个琪琪，又为孙家添丁，加上十八号，家族才有点样子。也改变小芳不能变超级赛亚人问题。十分有看点","text_exts":[{"e":58,"s":55,"text":"赛亚人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%B5%9B%E4%BA%9A%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774179784E3D9D2FD%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227118952854186541856%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227087921522270014479%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%B5%9B%E4%BA%9A%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1657510486,"group_id":"7087921522270014479","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"想写一本自己喜欢的书","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N39XoB0LmB238s1wNGqXA9TBA5TlXY4ZpFa3y1HH/a7T","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5ca0086253544aa7959a94fac866d8b4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709768&x-signature=yfbaW0RHvADaS6pc6XNPmF7en7k%3D","user_id":"3403705893530391","user_name":"用户34037058"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3403705893530391","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7087921522270014479","book_info":{"abstract":"苏木，意外穿越到龙珠世界孙悟饭小时候的身上。
　　并且成功的激活拾取属性系统。
　　【叮，前面掉落战斗属性+100。】
　　【叮，前方掉落界王拳技能属性。】
　　.......
　　从此他的人生就开了挂，震撼了所有的人。
　　孙悟空：“没有想到悟饭体内隐藏的力量这么强大，战斗力已经远远的超过我了。”
　　北界王：“这个小子的天赋堪称妖孽啊，我的界王拳竟然看一遍就会！”
　　贝吉塔：“不、不可能，我这么可能会输给一个下级战士的儿子？”
　　克林：“比克不愧是一代魔王，竟然能教出那么恐怖的妖孽。”
　　弗利萨：“什、什么？你是......超级赛亚人？”
　　沙鲁：“怎么会这样，孙悟饭的力量怎么会这么强大？”
　　界王神：“这是什么情况？这力量已经超越神了啊！”
　　......
